title: Bakshi&Bitton: A Documentary Database of Israeli Supreme Court Interventions in Elected-Branch Decisions and Appointments
description: A structured, source-linked documentary database of Israeli Supreme Court rulings on government decisions and appointments. Each record includes the case number, panel composition, doctrine invoked, vote split, outcome, and a direct link to the official ruling. Bilingual (Hebrew/English). The dataset is released as JSON and CSV.
